description: CompositionBlack hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a hood with a drawstring, long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, pockets on the front waist and branding in print on the chestFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this hooded sweatshirt from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
